suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Dashboard testing guidance: 'When running Next.js dashboard for testing (browser-based or e2e), always use production build (`pnpm build && pnpm start`) instead of `pnpm dev` to avoid EMFILE errors on macOS. The Playwright config already follows this pattern.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three dashboard-products features (dashboard-product-list, dashboard-product-detail, e2e-tests-cross-area) encountered or worked around EMFILE errors with the Next.js dev server. The Playwright config was written to use build+start. Already documented in .factory/library/user-testing.md but not in AGENTS.md testing guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: EMFILE error observation from all 3 reviews suggesting updates to library or AGENTS.md
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — EMFILE workaround is already documented in .factory/library/user-testing.md. Recommending AGENTS.md update instead as a suggested guidance change since it's normative.
